## Description

Install nanobot from scratch, configure it to use the Qwen API, add MCP tools for LMS integration, and write a skill prompt.

## Deliverables

- [ ] Nanobot installed and configured
- [ ] Qwen API connected
- [ ] MCP tools for LMS registered
- [ ] Skill prompt written in `nanobot/workspace/skills/lms/SKILL.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Agent can answer questions about available labs using MCP tools
- [ ] Agent knows when to ask for a lab parameter
- [ ] Agent formats numeric results correctly (percentages, counts)
